objective_coverage.notes: Strong coverage with INS_002 providing clear progression analysis
Adequate but could benefit from deeper platform comparison analysis
Group ordering covered but broader social dynamics under-explored
Paradox identified but mechanism needs deeper investigation

critical_issues.issue: High contradiction rate in subscription insight
critical_issues.description: 5 contradictions against 14 supporting quotes (36% contradiction rate) exceeds 30% threshold
critical_issues.remediation: Re-examine subscription data for segment-specific patterns; contradictions may indicate different behavioral responses by persona type

moderate_issues.issue: Thin evidence base for Transitional Explorers
moderate_issues.description: Only 4 participants supporting entire persona category and associated insight
moderate_issues.remediation: Either strengthen with additional evidence or reframe as preliminary finding requiring validation

moderate_issues.description: Only 7 participants for persona that claims universal vulnerability patterns
moderate_issues.remediation: Qualify claims as preliminary or recruit additional participants in this segment

moderate_issues.description: 21 total contradictions suggest potential systematic issues in coding consistency or participant reliability
moderate_issues.remediation: Conduct inter-coder reliability check and examine contradiction patterns for systematic bias

recommended_deep_dives.rationale: High contradiction rate suggests complex underlying dynamics not fully captured
recommended_deep_dives.approach: Segment subscription users by persona and academic stage; analyze contradiction patterns

recommended_deep_dives.rationale: Platform selection insight has moderate evidence but high strategic importance
recommended_deep_dives.approach: Deep dive into platform choice decision trees and switching triggers

recommended_deep_dives.rationale: Social dynamics appear in multiple insights but not systematically explored
recommended_deep_dives.approach: Map all social influence mechanisms across personas and contexts

recommended_deep_dives.rationale: Potentially important persona with insufficient evidence base
recommended_deep_dives.approach: Targeted recruitment of students in transition periods or reframe as hypothesis for future research

methodological_notes.evidence_distribution: Strong evidence concentration in top 3 insights (74 quotes) with concerning drop-off in later insights
methodological_notes.participant_coverage: Good overall coverage (33 participants) but uneven persona distribution
methodological_notes.coding_volume: 1689 coded segments suggests thorough analysis, but contradiction rate warrants coding consistency review
methodological_notes.triangulation_adequacy: Only 5 comparisons may be insufficient for 8 insights and 5 personas

issues_addressed: P014 artefact removed from Transitional Explorer (critical issue resolved)
INS_001 qualified: Friday ritual is predominantly undergraduate, not universal
INS_002 qualified: academic stage is proxy for income/lifestyle, not causal
INS_005 reframed: economic rationality, not psychological paradox (36% contradiction rate resolved)
INS_008 marked tentative: only 3 participants after P014 removal
Transitional Explorer persona marked tentative with methodological note
Academic stage classification corrected for all 33 participants
Three deep dives completed: subscription mechanism, platform switching, social influence
remaining_limitations: No non-users or lapsed users in sample
